Perplexity vs Quark

Compare Perplexity and Quark: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Perplexity

AI search engine: search + read + summarize in one step. Free tier with limited daily Pro searches, unlimited basic search. Pro $20/mo. Best source transparency.

Pros

  • ✓Best source transparency
  • ✓Great academic search
  • ✓Clean smooth interface
  • ✓Free tier enough for daily use

Cons

  • ✗Chinese content index weaker than local tools
  • ✗Limited free Pro searches
  • ✗Chinese answers less natural

Key Features

AI search + summarizeSource citationsFollow-up questionsFile upload analysisImage generationAcademic search
View Details →

Quark

Alibaba's intelligent search + AI assistant, integrated with Qwen 3.7. Multimodal search 38% faster, smart summary accuracy 97.8%. All-in-one search and creation tool.

Pros

  • ✓Integrated search + AI experience
  • ✓Basic features permanently free
  • ✓Smart analysis for docs/resume/PPT
  • ✓Built into browser, no extra install

Cons

  • ✗Advanced features require membership
  • ✗Primarily mobile-focused

Key Features

AI SearchAI Q&ASmart Document AnalysisAI PortraitScan to WordCloud Drive AI Assistant
View Details →
